name: OMOS.OneGodian.com Platform Console
productionStandard: Every OMOS app/module must be usable as public-facing page, logged-in dashboard, and admin/control panel.

entitySeparation.omOS: Node runtime, protocol/documentation, agent-facing integration, tools, and platform console.
entitySeparation.onegodianCom: Commerce, digital products, WooCommerce checkout, products, memberships, and downloads.
entitySeparation.onegodianOrg: Organization, public identity, institutional explanation, membership orientation, and public records.
entitySeparation.quantumOHI: Quantum-OHI / OHI explanation, services, intelligence architecture, and technical positioning.

notes: onegodian-site is a test file and must not appear as a public artifact.
Only one consensus counter should exist as /tools/consensus-counter and /artifacts/onegodian-consensus-counter.
